fixture: 015_filter_ranges

statement 1:
  sql:
    CREATE TABLE ranges (id INTEGER NOT NULL, qty INTEGER NOT NULL)
  result:
    ok
    rows_affected: 0

statement 2:
  sql:
    INSERT INTO ranges VALUES (1, 10)
  result:
    ok
    rows_affected: 1

statement 3:
  sql:
    INSERT INTO ranges VALUES (2, 20)
  result:
    ok
    rows_affected: 1

statement 4:
  sql:
    SELECT id FROM ranges WHERE qty >= 20
  result:
    query
    columns:
      [0] id INTEGER NOT NULL
    rows:
      [0] 2

statement 5:
  sql:
    SELECT qty FROM ranges WHERE id <= 1
  result:
    query
    columns:
      [0] qty INTEGER NOT NULL
    rows:
      [0] 10
